2176650.name: Shards of the Heart
2176650.description:
EARLY ACCESS CURRENTLY INCLUDES CHAPTERS 1-4, MORE WILL BE ADDED OVER TIME.

A runaway from another world. A jaded cop with a buried past. A bond that may decide the fate of both.

When a mysterious girl named Leandra appears in the human world, she crosses paths with officers Sawyer Randavix, April Jennings, and their calm but secretive captain, Kaheru. Leandra wants to live a peaceful life, but danger quickly follows in her wake, danger that threatens the town of Riviera.

As demons from Leandra’s world begin to surface, Sawyer is forced to confront her own trauma, rebuild broken relationships, and decide who she truly wants to protect. Your choices shape Sawyer’s bonds, and those bonds may be the key to saving them all.

Meet the Main Characters

Sawyer Randavix
A 23-year-old police officer with a sharp tongue and guarded heart. Driven by guilt and past mistakes, Sawyer hides her compassion beneath layers of sarcasm and emotional walls.

Leandra
A gentle but otherworldly girl who has fled her home to live peacefully among humans. She knows little about this world, but her kindness is genuine. What is she running from, and why are demons chasing her?

April Jennings
A cheerful and clumsy 21-year-old officer who’s eager to prove herself. Though she often gets scared, her optimism masks a deep desire to do what's right.

Kaheru
At just 25, she’s the calm and capable captain of the Riviera Police. While always composed and friendly, little is known about her life outside the job. She seems to know more than she lets on.

Emily Randavix
Sawyer’s estranged younger sister. Shy and soft-spoken, Emily joins the police force in hopes of reconnecting with Sawyer and healing the wounds left behind by their abusive past.

Gameplay Features

Shards of the Heart is a story-driven RPG with strong visual novel and dating sim elements. Dive deep into a branching narrative with rich character interactions and emotional storytelling.

Dialogue-driven choices shape your relationships and the outcome of the story

Bond system: Grow closer to your companions to unlock new scenes and endings

Turn-based combat with unique abilities tied to each character

Explore hand-crafted areas including the police station, a lively town, and other supernatural locations

Unlockable outfits and alternate costumes for each character

Multiple endings based on your choices and the relationships you build

Content Warning

Shards of the Heart contains mature and sensitive subject matter, including:

  • Murder

  • Discussion of sexual abuse and child abuse

  • Discussion of drug use and addiction

  • Strong language

  • Mental health themes

Player discretion is advised.
